flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Stout rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $10.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Stout fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Wisconsin-Stout rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (67.8% → 78.9%).
